scene.message: Maki: Someone's collapsed!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Th-that's Kido!!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Hey, Kido!{nl} Pull yourself together!{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:95}Ngh...{nl} D-damn it...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: ...{wait_fr:60}Why you~{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Kandori... it's{nl} been a while.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: You've got some{nl} nerve, pulling this.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: This is as far as{nl} you go, Mr. Kandori.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: You coward!{nl} Always using dirty tricks!{waitkey}{ret}
Aki: Nyaah!{nl} Papa is papa!{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: You've grown{nl} bold, boy.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Where's the compact?{nl} Give it back!{waitkey}{ret}
Aki: It's right here!{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: At last,{nl} the two compacts
become one in my hand...{waitkey}I thank you, boy.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: You - what do you{nl} intend to do with it?!{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: Show them, Aki.{waitkey}{ret}
Aki: Okay, papa!{wait_fr:79}{nl} Nomoraka Tanomamaa!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: What is this?{wait_fr:79} A mirror?!{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:60}Kandori{wait_fr:60} Takahisa!{wait_fr:60}{nl} I won't... let you escape!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Reiji, you're...{nl} that guy's brother?!{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Kandoriiiiiii!!{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: Noisy stray...{nl} Aki, silence him.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Reiji!!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Why you~!{nl} You've got some nerve!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: That's...!{nl} Mai-chan's compact?!{waitkey}{ret}
